name: N.W.A
bio: N.W.A has a durable hip-hop catalog that continues to attract listeners through streaming, playlists, and replay value.
notable_for: N.W.A remains closely associated with Straight Outta Compton and Fuck tha Police, which still anchor attention around the catalog.
career_highlight: Songs like Straight Outta Compton and Fuck tha Police still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Recognizable catalog cuts keep drawing repeat streaming long after the original release cycle.
Playlist memory and cultural recall help the strongest records stay active.
Sampling, sync use, and nostalgia spikes can lift the baseline.
